title: pro pvp sud
description: You're not a cheater, you hit the south...
body:
This datapack allows player to hit farther when they aim towards the south.

This project is a French reference where a cheater with improved reach said that he had not cheated and that if you look south you hit further.

⚠️ This data pack should be used as a joke, so don't overuse it.

> I told you I don't cheat! When you go south, it hits farther !!!!


<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/lOFIpBERKDw" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
